name: Vegetable Tofu Scramble
recipeIngredient: 1 pound Tofu, soft, cut into 1/2-inch cubes
1 medium Zucchini, cut into 1/2-inch thick rounds
1 Corn ear, kernels cut off the cob, or
4 ounces Asparagus, trimmed and cut into 1-inch pieces
1/2 cup Basil or parsley, fresh, chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. In a wok or large skillet, heat the oil over medium-high heat.
2. Add the tofu, onion, zucchini, corn, asparagus, and garlic to the pan.
3. Stir-fry until crisp-tender, about 3 minutes.
4. Add the tomatoes, basil, tamari, cumin, turmeric, and cayenne pepper.
5. Stir-fry until the tomatoes are heated through, about 1 minute.
6. Serve immediately.
